name: shielded-shell
description: Zero-trust local safety harness for CLI coding agents

scripts.build: npm run build -w @shieldedshell/core && npm run build -w @shieldedshell/cli
scripts.pack:check: npm run build && npm pack -w @shieldedshell/core --dry-run && npm pack -w @shieldedshell/cli --dry-run
scripts.publish:npm: npm run test && npm run build && npm publish -w @shieldedshell/core --access restricted && npm publish -w @shieldedshell/cli --access restricted
